latin: Magister parvus et viridis discipulo suo dixit: 'aut fac aut noli. temptare non est.'

questions.prompt: What does the small master look like?

questions.target: Either do it or don't — there is no trying
choices: Either do it or don't — there is no trying

translation: The small, green master said to his student: 'Either do or do not. There is no trying.'
